I try to install  the cupy-rocm 5.0 and i check it in my conda environments .but i can not imporrt this . i try to removr it and reinstall the cupy-rocm 5.0 but it still not work for me . i want to replenishment that   is i use rocm 6.0 and my python is 3.9.18 .

### To Reproduce

i can not import cupy , even when i try make a new environment for testing import Cupy using "python -c "import cupy; cupy.show_config()" it still can not work . 

### Installation

Wheel (`pip install cupy-***`)

### Environment

 python -c "import cupy; print(cupy.__version__)"

ImportError: 
================================================================
Failed to import CuPy.

If you installed CuPy via wheels (cupy-cudaXXX or cupy-rocm-X-X), make sure that the package matches with the version of CUDA or ROCm installed.

On Linux, you may need to set LD_LIBRARY_PATH environment variable depending on how you installed CUDA/ROCm.
On Windows, try setting CUDA_PATH environment variable.

Check the Installation Guide for details:
  https://docs.cupy.dev/en/latest/install.html
